title: How a man of God leads when no one's watching
caption:
The room doesn't know your name. And that's fine.

The man who leads without credit is doing something harder than leadership — he's doing formation. Every move costs something he'll never get back in applause.

So he goes first into the apology. Serves the room nobody notices. Carries the weight when the situation needs someone to absorb it. Tells the truth when silence would've been easier.

Jesus went first into the cross, not first to the throne. The order hasn't changed.

"He that is greatest among you shall be your servant." — Matthew 23:11

Save this for the week it feels pointless.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #discipleship #scripture #discipline
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
